results.name: differently named lands matter
results.description: These cards want you to have multiple lands with different names.

results.name: digital only artwork
results.description: Card art that is currently only available in digital games such as Arena.

results.name: digital-only mechanics
results.description: Cards with mechanics designed for the digital environment of Magic Arena. Includes Unknown and acorn cards with mechanics equivalent to an existing Arena one.

results.name: digital to paper
results.description: These cards were originally created for a set that did not see a physical printing, but were later printed in paper.

results.name: dilemma
results.description: Effects that give you two equally bad choices.

results.name: dinosaur skull
results.description: Contains a recognizable dinosaur skull.

results.name: dirigible
results.description: Zeppelins, blimps, and similar aircraft.

results.name: dirndl
results.description: Traditional dress from germanic regions around the alps.

results.name: discard
results.description: Gets cards out of your opponent's hand and into their graveyard.

results.name: discarded type matters
results.description: The type of card you discard matters for some effect.

results.name: discard to exile
results.description: Put cards from the opponent's hand into exile, either permanently or by [banishing](banish-hand) them.

results.name: discard to library
results.description: Put cards from the opponent's hand back into their library.

results.name: discount-self
results.description: Cards that have a way to reduce their own cost

results.name: disembodied eye
results.description: An eye or pair of eyes disembodied, especially watching.

results.name: disenchant/naturalize
results.description: Cards that remove artifacts and/or enchantments.

results.name: disintegrate
results.description: Damaged creatures are exiled instead of dying.

results.name: distinct echo cost
results.description: Cards where the echo cost is different from the casting cost

results.name: ditch hand
results.description: Cards that let you get rid of your current hand in some way or other.

results.name: divides battlefield
results.description: Cards which divide all Creatures on the Battlefield into two or more sections, which often but not always can't block each other.

results.name: division
results.description:
Cards that ask for a divided value.
For cards that include a fractional value or a number that is not a whole number, see [non-integer](non-integer).

results.name: divvy
results.description: Cards that make you choose from two or more piles.

results.name: dnd
results.description: Cards made to reference mechanical parts of the Dungeons and Dragons TTRPG.

results.name: dnd book
results.description: Cards that are named after an actual printed Dungeons and Dragons book or adventure module.

results.name: dnd cartoon
results.description: References to the 1983 DnD television cartoon.

results.name: dnd character
results.description: Cards that represent Dungeons and Dragons characters: name, rules text, etc. See also the [dungeons and dragons](/tags/artwork/dungeons-and-dragons) art tag.

results.name: dnd item
results.description: Cards named after and representing DnD items.

results.name: dnd mechanic
results.description: Cards named after and representing DnD mechanics.

results.name: dnd monster
results.description: Cards named after and representing monsters from DnD.

results.name: dnd multiverse
results.description: Art set in the various worlds of Dungeons and Dragons, including but not limited to the [Forgotten Realms](https://tagger.scryfall.com/tags/artwork/abeir-toril).

results.name: dnd spell
results.description: Cards originally from DnD sets that are named after and representing DnD spells.

results.name: doctor who
results.description: A long-running sci-fi television franchise starring [the eponymous Doctor](the-doctor) and their companions.

results.name: doctor who episode saga
results.description: A series of cards named after and mechanically referencing various doctor who episodes.
